Hero.title: Oliva Beach Apartment
Hero.subtitle: Your seaside escape in Oliva Nova, Spain

About.title: About the Apartment
About.text1: Enjoy the perfect sunrise right over the sea and a pleasant holiday atmosphere in our stylish apartment in Oliva Nova. Located just steps away from endless beaches - and almost without people! Experience peace, sun, and the sound of the sea every day.
About.text2: The sea-view apartment offers 2 bedrooms, a living room with a sofa bed, a fully equipped kitchen, and 1 bathroom. Nearby you will find restaurants, a supermarket, and everything you need for a carefree holiday.

Pricing.title: Rates
Pricing.note: * Prices are indicative and may vary depending on specific dates and holidays. Long term price excludes energy costs.

bedroom1.label: Bedroom 1
bedroom1.items: King size bed, Bed linen, Air condition, Sea view

bedroom2.label: Bedroom 2
bedroom2.items: 2 single beds, Bed linen, Air condition

livingroom.label: Living Room
livingroom.items: Sofa bed, Dining table, Tv, Internet, Air condition, Sea view, Covered terrace with outdoor furniture

kitchen.label: Kitchen
kitchen.items: Fridge, Electric oven, Microwave, Coffee machine Dolce gusto, Toaster, Dishwasher, Washing machine

bathroom.label: Bathroom
bathroom.items: Bath tub, Wc and washbasin, Hair dryer, Towels

Resort.title: Resort Amenities
Resort.subtitle: Everything you need for a perfect holiday
Resort.text: Our apartment is part of a beautiful resort complex featuring large swimming pools and well-maintained gardens. It's the perfect place to relax after a day at the beach.

Location.title: Oliva Nova
Location.description: Discover the beauty of Oliva Nova, a hidden gem on the Costa Blanca. With its endless sandy beaches, world-renowned golf course, and a variety of sports activities, it is the perfect place for both relaxation and adventure.

restaurants.title: Restaurants in the Area
restaurants.olibaba: Olibaba - A stylish beach club with a unique atmosphere and great food.
restaurants.riomar: Camping Rio Mar - Traditional cuisine and a friendly environment just a short walk from the apartment.
restaurants.darbar: Darbar - An authentic Indian restaurant with a rich variety of flavors.
restaurants.alavora: Alavora - A first-class restaurant specializing in fresh seafood.
restaurants.tiorico: Tio Rico el Italiano - Traditional Italian cuisine with a family atmosphere.

establishments.title: Shopping in the Area
establishments.mercadona: Mercadona Oliva - The largest and most popular supermarket in Oliva for all your grocery needs.
establishments.portal: Portal de la Marina - A large shopping center in Ondara with a wide range of shops, restaurants, and a cinema.

sports.title: Sports Activities
sports.kitesurf: Kitesurfing / Wingfoil - Oliva is a paradise for wind and wave lovers.
sports.karting: Karting - Experience adrenaline at the nearby Karting Vives circuit.
sports.golf: Golf Course - An 18-hole course designed by the legendary Severiano Ballesteros.
sports.padel: Padel - Modern courts for the popular Spanish racket sport.
